prompt: A luxury fashion magazine cover photographed in a modern executive office, featuring a stylish young East Asian businesswoman standing beside a wooden desk in a confident editorial pose. She has long, smooth, dark brown to black hair parted slightly off center, falling over both shoulders, and wears a fitted ribbed knit short-sleeve top in {argument name="top color" default="deep navy"}, tucked into a high-waisted ribbed pencil skirt in {argument name="skirt color" default="black"}. Add a delicate silver necklace with a small key pendant. Her body is angled slightly toward camera, with one hand lifted loosely near shoulder height and the other hand pointing down toward papers on the desk, conveying poised authority and effortless elegance. The setting is a refined corner office with warm wood bookshelves filled with books, a tufted brown leather executive chair, a polished wooden desk with neatly arranged documents and dark desk pads, and a tall window on the right revealing a soft blurred city skyline. Use soft natural daylight from the window mixed with warm interior tones, shallow depth of field, premium magazine photography, polished skin, realistic fabric texture, tasteful retouching, and a sophisticated editorial mood. Overlay elegant serif magazine typography: a very large masthead at the top left reading {argument name="magazine title" default="OFFICE STYLE"}, small issue text at the top right reading {argument name="issue text" default="MAY/JUN 2024 VOL.28"}, and 5 cover lines total: on the upper right, "Modern Professional Wardrobe" with the smaller subtext "Refined pieces for confident everyday elegance."; on the upper left, "THE POWER OF PRESENCE" with the smaller subtext "Style is not just what you wear—it's how you carry yourself."; on the left middle, "DESIGNED FOR IMPACT" with the smaller subtext "Clean silhouettes. Timeless colors. Endless possibilities."; across the lower left in very large serif type, {argument name="main cover line" default="CONFIDENT & CAPABLE"}; and on the lower right, "FOCUS ELEVATE ACHIEVE" with the smaller subtext "Professional style that moves with you.". Vertical portrait layout, high-end fashion magazine cover composition, clean spacing, muted luxury palette, realistic office styling, chic corporate femininity, confidence in motion.
translatedPrompt: 一张在现代行政办公室拍摄的奢华时尚杂志封面，画面中一位时尚的年轻东亚女商人站在木质办公桌旁，摆出自信的编辑摄影姿势。她留着顺滑的深棕色至黑色长发，中分偏侧，垂落在双肩，身穿一件 {argument name="top color" default="深海军蓝"} 的修身罗纹针织短袖上衣，下搭一条 {argument name="skirt color" default="黑色"} 的高腰罗纹铅笔裙。佩戴一条精致的银色项链，挂坠为一把小钥匙。她的身体略微朝向镜头，一只手随意抬起至肩部高度，另一只手指向桌上的文件，展现出从容的权威感与毫不费力的优雅。背景是一间精致的转角办公室，配有摆满书籍的暖色木质书架、簇绒棕色皮革行政椅、摆放整齐的文件和深色桌垫的抛光木质办公桌，右侧的高大窗户透出柔和模糊的城市天际线。运用来自窗户的柔和自然光与室内暖色调混合，浅景深，高端杂志摄影质感，细腻的皮肤纹理，逼真的面料质感，高雅的修图风格，以及精致的编辑氛围。叠加优雅的衬线杂志排版：左上角为超大刊头 {argument name="magazine title" default="OFFICE STYLE"}，右上角为小型期刊文字 {argument name="issue text" default="2024 年 5 月/6 月刊 第 28 卷"}，以及总共 5 条封面导语：右上角为“现代职业衣橱”，副标题为“为自信的日常优雅打造精致单品。”；左上角为“存在感的力量”，副标题为“风格不仅是你穿什么，更是你如何展现自我。”；左中部为“为影响力而设计”，副标题为“利落的剪裁。永恒的色彩。无限的可能。”；左下角为超大衬线字体 {argument name="main cover line" default="自信与干练"}；右下角为“专注 提升 成就”，副标题为“随你而动的职业风格。”。竖向肖像构图，高端时尚杂志封面排版，简洁的间距，低调奢华的色调，写实的办公室造型，时髦的职场女性气质，动感中的自信。

breakdown.creativeCore: 职场风尚杂志封面：此提示词可生成一张精致的杂志风格封面，展现了一位在奢华办公室环境中充满自信的职业女性形象，非常适合时尚品牌宣传、模拟封面及企业风格营销活动。
breakdown.subject: 人物
constraints: 过度真实导致细节瑕疵显眼
breakdown.bestUse: 杂志封面、专题页、品牌刊物、人物专访视觉

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: vertical]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: realistic, editorial, luxury, premium]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: shallow depth, depth of field, camera]。

Text requirements:
文字是主视觉。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
